title: Aquaculture Fish Specie
description: Specie entity describes scientific and physiological parameters of an aquaculture fish species, including digestion, feeding capacity, and biological growth-related properties used for simulation and monitoring

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be Specie

absorptionRatio.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Ratio of nutrients absorbed by the fish from ingested food, used in bioenergetics modelling

stomachCapacity.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'g'. Maximum capacity of the fish stomach in grams of food

waterUptake.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mL/h'. Rate of water uptake by the fish, relevant for osmoregulation studies

midgutMaxdur.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'h'. Maximum duration of food transit through the midgut of the fish

ingestionDelay.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'min'. Time delay between food presentation and the start of ingestion by the fish

transportPattern.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Numerical coefficient representing the food transport pattern through the digestive system of the fish

appetiteFactor.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Factor representing the appetite level of the fish species, influencing feed consumption rates

midgutVolume.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mL'. Volume of the fish midgut used in digestive capacity calculations

digestionDelay.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'h'. Time delay required for the fish to complete digestion of a meal

hasFishPopulation.description: Relationship. Reference to the FishPopulation entity that uses this species definition
